stats.students_desc: Nurturing a generation of character and achievement.

stats.achievements_desc: Achieving outstanding accomplishments in various fields.

marquee.words: EDUCATION • CHARACTER • INNOVATION • FUTURE • INTEGRITY • EXCELLENCE •

impact_spotlight.title: Chairman's Welcome Message
impact_spotlight.subtitle: Welcome Message from the Chairman
impact_spotlight.name: Mr. Ir. Pandu Gunandito
impact_spotlight.heading: Building the Future Through Quality Education
impact_spotlight.speech: Peace be upon you, and Allah's mercy and blessings. Praise be to Allah SWT for all His grace and gifts. Yayasan Pendidikan Metland is here with a strong commitment to educating the nation's life through quality, character-based education grounded in Islamic values. We believe that every child deserves the best education to achieve a bright future.

tk_tunas.tagline: Instilling a love of learning from an early age

sd_tunas.tagline: A solid foundation for a bright future

smk_pariwisata.tagline: Professionals in the tourism and hospitality industry

impact_numbers.subtitle: In the Context of
impact_numbers.title: Our Impact
impact_numbers.desc1: Since 1998, Yayasan Pendidikan Metland has been dedicated to creating quality education access for Indonesia's youth.
impact_numbers.desc2: Through our various education units, we remain committed to producing graduates who are innovative, possess strong character, and are ready to face future challenges.

rows.label: Years of Experience
rows.heading: Serving Education in Indonesia
rows.description: Since its establishment, Yayasan Pendidikan Metland remains committed to providing the best educational services by prioritizing character building and students' academic competence.

rows.label: Students Educated
rows.heading: Building a Superior Generation
rows.description: We have educated thousands of students from Kindergarten to Higher Education, equipping them with relevant skills for future industry needs.

rows.label: Awards
rows.heading: Achievements and Recognition
rows.description: Our dedication in the world of education has been recognized through various regional and national awards, proving our consistent quality of education.

contact.hero_subtitle: For more information about Yayasan Pendidikan Metland

about.hero_subtitle: Two decades of transforming lives through education, character, and sustainable empowerment.
about.mission_desc: To build an education system that integrates academic knowledge, practical skills, and superior character to prepare students to become future leaders.
about.vision_desc: To become a leading educational institution nationally recognized for producing outstanding, innovative, and noble graduates.

journey.text: Foundation established with a vision to transform Indonesia through education.
First scholarship program launched to support high-achieving students.
Opened new education units across various regions.
Reached thousands of successful alumni across various industries.
Launched digital literacy initiatives, equipping youth with tech skills.
Continuing to grow and produce global-standard excellent graduates.

artikel.newsletter_desc: Get the latest news and information from Yayasan Pendidikan Metland straight to your email.
artikel.not_found_desc: The article you are looking for may have been removed or is unavailable.

literasi.why_desc1: Literacy is not just the ability to read and write. In this digital age, literacy encompasses the ability to think critically, deeply understand information, and communicate ideas effectively.
literasi.why_desc2: Yayasan Pendidikan Metland is committed to making literacy the foundation of all learning processes, ensuring every student grows into a smart, critical, and knowledgeable individual.
literasi.digital_desc: Access our digital library anytime, anywhere. Available 24/7 with a growing collection of e-books to support the learning needs of students and teachers.
literasi.empty_desc: Digital books will be added soon
literasi.cta_desc: Register yourself or your child for our literacy program and build a reading habit from an early age.

koleksi.title: Textbooks & References
koleksi.desc: Collection of textbooks and academic references for all levels of education.

koleksi.title: Journals & Magazines
koleksi.desc: Scientific journals, educational magazines, and national and international periodicals.

koleksi.title: E-Library
koleksi.desc: 24-hour digital library access with thousands of electronic books and online resources.

koleksi.title: Shared Study Rooms
koleksi.desc: Comfortable and conducive group study and discussion room facilities.

programs.title: Reading Corner
programs.desc: Free book reading program every Friday for all levels. Provides access to quality reading material for all students.

programs.title: Literacy Club
programs.desc: Monthly routine book discussions guided by experienced mentors. Building an active and critical reader community.

programs.title: Writing Contest
programs.desc: Annual scientific and fiction writing competition between schools. Honing creativity and thinking skills.

programs.title: Book Review
programs.desc: Interactive event dissecting the content and meaning of selected books. Deepening literacy understanding collaboratively.

programs.title: Story Telling
programs.desc: Developing storytelling and public presentation skills. Training self-confidence and communication skills.

programs.title: Library Visit
programs.desc: Educational visits to national and regional libraries. Inspiring the passion for reading from an early age.

strukturOrganisasi.hero_description: The leadership structure of Yayasan Pendidikan Metland that supports professional education governance.
strukturOrganisasi.org_chart_desc: The foundation's coordination flow from trustees to education units.
strukturOrganisasi.team_desc: The team guiding the foundation's strategy, oversight, and program implementation.
strukturOrganisasi.members_desc: Information about management members and supporting leadership at Yayasan Pendidikan Metland.

team_groups.description: Provides main direction and ensures the foundation's vision stays consistent.
Oversees governance, accountability, and the sustainability of foundation programs.
Manages operations and coordinates education programs.

ourSchool.hero_description: Yayasan Pendidikan Metland manages 5 quality education units from kindergarten to higher education.

visiMisi.hero_description: The foundational values and direction of Yayasan Pendidikan Metland in advancing the nation's generation.
visiMisi.visi_text: To become a leading educational foundation that produces an outstanding, characterful, and globally competitive generation for the progress of the Indonesian nation.
visiMisi.visi_quote: "An outstanding generation is not only academically intelligent, but also has strong character, high ethics, and the ability to adapt to the changing times."
misi_items: Providing high-quality education from kindergarten to higher education levels, oriented towards academic excellence and character building.
Developing innovative curricula that are responsive to industry needs and global technological developments.
Building an inclusive, safe, comfortable, and inspiring learning environment for all learners.
Empowering dedicated professional educators who continuously develop their scientific and pedagogical competencies.
Establishing strategic partnerships with businesses, industries, and national and international educational institutions.
Instilling national values, tolerance, and social awareness in every educational process.

tk-tunas-metropolitan.description: TK Tunas Metropolitan is an early childhood education level focused on character development, creativity, and emotional intelligence. With a play-based learning approach, we ensure every child grows happily and is ready for the next level.

sd-tunas-metropolitan.description: SD Tunas Metropolitan provides comprehensive basic education combining academics, arts, sports, and technology. We believe every child has unique potential that needs to be optimally developed.

smk-pariwisata-metland-school.description: SMK Pariwisata Metland School prepares students to become professionals in tourism, hospitality, and culinary fields. With industry-standard practice facilities and partnerships with star-rated hotels, our graduates are ready to compete nationally and internationally.

smk-metland.description: SMK Metland focuses on technical and business majors relevant to modern industry needs. Internship programs at partner companies ensure students gain real work experience before graduating.

metland-college.description: Metland College is a vocational higher education institution offering D3 and D4 programs in business, technology, and tourism. With curricula developed alongside industry, Metland College graduates have high competence and are ready to enter the workforce.
